_comment: Synthetic receipts for CI replay of scripts/counterfactual_replay.py. Shape matches borg.core.value_receipts.replayable_receipts() output (schema v2). 'mock' pins the offline judge verdict so the expected counterfactual_rate is exact: 2 stuck / 5 judged = 40%. One receipt has no replay_context (skipped).

replay_context.error_redacted: django.db.migrations.exceptions.InconsistentMigrationHistory: Migration app.0007 is applied before its dependency app.0006
replay_context.fix_surfaced: python manage.py migrate app 0005 --fake, then re-apply 0006..0007 in order
the agent was writing into the container-mounted read-only volume; write to the scratch dir instead

replay_context.error_redacted: TypeError: unsupported operand type(s) for +: 'int' and 'str'
replay_context.fix_surfaced: cast the config port to int before arithmetic

replay_context.error_redacted: KeyError: 'DATABASE_URL' — env var set as [REDACTED:credential_assignment] in .env but compose file does not pass it through
replay_context.fix_surfaced: add the variable to the docker-compose environment block; .env alone is not forwarded to the service
